case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. VAN NGUYEN KIEM AKA KIEM NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN NGUYEN KIEM AKA KIEM NGUYEN $3,111.20 PRINCIPAL, $277.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,388.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
